text:
- USE_XLIB -> USE_X_PREFIX
- Use GTK_CONFIG instead of hardcoded gtk12-config
- Replace external rxvt/vim with more common xterm/vi
- Fix pkg/PLIST

patches/patch-ad  patches/patch-ae  patches/patch-af
